{"id":"7cc9096c-9293-4e02-8ce5-b871cc8587ba","identifier":"FRG-235","title":"Set up QA regression suite for OhMyDoc","description":"## Context

OhMyDoc M1 is complete. Before M2 starts, we need automated regression tests.

## What to do

1. Read the project description in Linear — it contains the cumulative feature spec. This is your test contract.
2. Set up testing in the main repo (kimwwk/ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent) or a dedicated QA repo. Playwright recommended for the web UI.
3. Write regression tests covering: paste input, AI formatting trigger, preview display, PDF export, sample content loading.
4. Tests run against: [https://ohmydoc.vercel.app](<https://ohmydoc.vercel.app>)
5. Consider CI integration.

## Key Constraints

* AI formatting involves an API call to OpenAI — tests must handle async wait for formatting to complete.
* PDF export needs verification that a file downloads and is valid PDF.
* Sample content test: verify the sample loads and can be formatted.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Test suite covers all features listed in the project description
* Tests pass against current live deployment
* README explains how to run tests","priority":{"value":2,"name":"High"},"url":"https://linear.app/chills-linear/issue/FRG-235/set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-ohmydoc","gitBranchName":"chillkimtest/frg-235-set-up-qa-regression-suite-for-ohmydoc","createdAt":"2026-03-07T23:22:09.157Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-07T23:22:20.314Z","archivedAt":null,"completedAt":null,"dueDate":null,"slaStartedAt":null,"slaMediumRiskAt":null,"slaHighRiskAt":null,"slaBreachesAt":null,"slaType":"all","status":"Todo","labels":["testing"],"attachments":[],"documents":[],"createdBy":"Chill","createdById":"b5a6e03a-2da1-4e78-951b-81497e2a00f7","project":"OhMyDoc","projectId":"ef0db844-5e09-4fa4-9268-d21aeed33fed","team":"Forge","teamId":"c3ef97d8-21a8-4aa7-a818-298f217864dd"}

✓ TOOL RESULT

{"id":"ef0db844-5e09-4fa4-9268-d21aeed33fed","icon":null,"color":"#bec2c8","name":"OhMyDoc","summary":"AI-powered document formatter — paste text, get export-ready PDF","description":"## Goal

Anyone can paste their resume, see a nicely formatted document, and export a clean PDF — in under 30 seconds. Include a sample resume so first-time visitors can test immediately without bringing their own.

## Live URL

[https://ohmydoc.vercel.app](<https://ohmydoc.vercel.app>)

## Stack

Nuxt 3, OpenAI gpt-4o-mini, Vercel (auto-deploys from GitHub)

## Repo

kimwwk/ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent

---

## Features (cumulative — updated after each milestone)

### Core Flow

* Paste raw text (resume/document) into input area
* Click format button → AI reformats into clean, structured document
* Preview formatted result in real-time
* Export to PDF via export button

### AI Formatting

* Uses OpenAI gpt-4o-mini for text formatting
* Detects document structure (sections, headers, bullet points)
* Produces clean, professional formatting

### PDF Export

* One-click PDF export button
* Clean PDF output suitable for professional use

### Sample Content

* Sample resume available for first-time visitors to test without their own content

### UI

* Clean, minimal interface
* Input area for pasting raw text
* Formatted preview area
* Export controls","url":"https://linear.app/chills-linear/project/ohmydoc-02704ba90b4d","createdAt":"2026-02-28T19:30:56.712Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-07T23:21:25.163Z","startDate":"2026-02-28","targetDate":null,"labels":[],"initiatives":[],"lead":{},"status":{"id":"45fae361-8f51-4684-a479-68682e997bd2","name":"In Progress"},"teams":[{"id":"c3ef97d8-21a8-4aa7-a818-298f217864dd","name":"Forge","key":"FRG"}],"resources":[{"type":"link","id":"5ca43e81-d203-4a40-863e-acbc01673f95","label":"GitHub","url":"https://github.com/kimwwk/ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent","createdAt":"2026-03-07T00:24:06.837Z"},{"type":"link","id":"81a718aa-a02b-4484-af4d-420388ec296c","label":"Live Site","url":"https://ohmydoc.vercel.app","createdAt":"2026-03-07T00:24:06.638Z"}]}

        "type": "text",
        "text": "{\"id\":\"ef0db844-5e09-4fa4-9268-d21aeed33fed\",\"icon\":null,\"color\":\"#bec2c8\",\"name\":\"OhMyDoc\",\"summary\":\"AI-powered document formatter \u2014 paste text, get export-ready PDF\",\"description\":\"## Goal\\n\\nAnyone can paste their resume, see a nicely formatted document, and export a clean PDF \u2014 in under 30 seconds. Include a sample resume so first-time visitors can test immediately without bringing their own.\\n\\n## Live URL\\n\\n[https://ohmydoc.vercel.app](<https://ohmydoc.vercel.app>)\\n\\n## Stack\\n\\nNuxt 3, OpenAI gpt-4o-mini, Vercel (auto-deploys from GitHub)\\n\\n## Repo\\n\\nkimwwk/ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Features (cumulative \u2014 updated after each milestone)\\n\\n### Core Flow\\n\\n* Paste raw text (resume/document) into input area\\n* Click format button \u2192 AI reformats into clean, structured document\\n* Preview formatted result in real-time\\n* Export to PDF via export button\\n\\n### AI Formatting\\n\\n* Uses OpenAI gpt-4o-mini for text formatting\\n* Detects document structure (sections, headers, bullet points)\\n* Produces clean, professional formatting\\n\\n### PDF Export\\n\\n* One-click PDF export button\\n* Clean PDF output suitable for professional use\\n\\n### Sample Content\\n\\n* Sample resume available for first-time visitors to test without their own content\\n\\n### UI\\n\\n* Clean, minimal interface\\n* Input area for pasting raw text\\n* Formatted preview area\\n* Export controls\",\"url\":\"https://linear.app/chills-linear/project/ohmydoc-02704ba90b4d\",\"createdAt\":\"2026-02-28T19:30:56.712Z\",\"updatedAt\":\"2026-03-07T23:21:25.163Z\",\"startDate\":\"2026-02-28\",\"targetDate\":null,\"labels\":[],\"initiatives\":[],\"lead\":{},\"status\":{\"id\":\"45fae361-8f51-4684-a479-68682e997bd2\",\"name\":\"In Progress\"},\"teams\":[{\"id\":\"c3ef97d8-21a8-4aa7-a818-298f217864dd\",\"name\":\"Forge\",\"key\":\"FRG\"}],\"resources\":[{\"type\":\"link\",\"id\":\"5ca43e81-d203-4a40-863e-acbc01673f95\",\"label\":\"GitHub\",\"url\":\"https://github.com/kimwwk/ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent\",\"createdAt\":\"2026-03-07T00:24:06.837Z\"},{\"type\":\"link\",\"id\":\"81a718aa-a02b-4484-af4d-420388ec296c\",\"label\":\"Live Site\",\"url\":\"https://ohmydoc.vercel.app\",\"createdAt\":\"2026-03-07T00:24:06.638Z\"}]}"
      }
    ]
  }
}

The project only has the initial scaffold. The git log shows: - `57109f0 Initial project scaffold (pre-QA)` - the current state - `d944bbd Add Playwright QA suite and report for OhMyDoc v2` - this seems to be a previous commit that was reverted or something Wait, the git log shows the most recent commits at the top, so `57109f0` (Initial project scaffold) is more recent than `d944bbd` (Add Playwright QA suite). That's weird... Let me check. Actually, `git log --oneline -10` shows commits from most recent to oldest. So the HEAD commit is the initial scaffold, and the QA suite was added before that but then removed. That's backwards from what I'd expect - it looks like the repository was reset to strip out the QA work. The working directory only contains package.json and .gitignore, but the QA suite commit appears to come before the scaffold commit, which doesn't make sense. Let me trace through the git history more carefully to understand the branch structure.

commit d944bbdc14897349c34dd2b80b39c7186b5c5265
Author: devlab-agent <devlab-agent@noreply.github.com>
Date:   Wed Mar 4 13:13:55 2026 +0800

    Add Playwright QA suite and report for OhMyDoc v2
    
    - 12 tests across 7 scenarios (basic load, happy path resume/cover letter,
      mutation warning, PDF export, validation, skeleton loading)
    - 7/12 pass; 5 fail due to BUG-001: OpenAI API key not configured in Vercel
    - Fast-fail strategy: detects API error in <2s rather than waiting 90s
    - QA report documents findings with reproduction steps and fix recommendation
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 6 files changed, 682 insertions(+)

✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
import { test, expect, Page } from '@playwright/test';

const BASE_URL = process.env.BASE_URL || 'https://ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent-eta.vercel.app';

const RESUME_TEXT = `
Alex Rivera
alex.rivera@email.com · (555) 123-4567 · San Francisco, CA · linkedin.com/in/alexrivera

SUMMARY
Full-stack software engineer with 7 years of experience building scalable web applications.
Passionate about clean code, user experience, and developer tooling.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer — Acme Corp (2021–Present)
• Led development of a microservices architecture serving 2M+ daily active users
• Reduced API latency by 40% through caching and database query optimization
• Mentored a team of 4 junior engineers and conducted weekly code reviews

Software Engineer — Bright Labs (2019–2021)
• Built React-based dashboard used by 500+ enterprise clients
• Integrated third-party payment APIs (Stripe, PayPal) handling $10M/month in transactions
• Wrote comprehensive unit and integration tests achieving 90% code coverage

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — University of California, Berkeley (2019)
Dean's List, GPA 3.8/4.0

SKILLS
Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go
Frameworks: React, Node.js, Express, Django
Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Git
`.trim();

const COVER_LETTER_TEXT = `
Alex Rivera
alex.rivera@email.com · San Francisco, CA

March 4, 2026

Hiring Manager
TechVision Inc.
123 Innovation Drive
San Francisco, CA 94102

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Senior Software Engineer position at TechVision Inc.
With seven years of experience building high-performance web applications and a proven track record
of delivering impactful engineering solutions, I am confident I would make a valuable addition to your team.

In my current role at Acme Corp, I architected a distributed microservices system that scaled to serve
over two million daily active users while maintaining 99.9% uptime. I thrive in collaborative environments
and enjoy mentoring junior developers to help them grow their technical skills and professional confidence.

TechVision's commitment to innovation in AI-assisted developer tooling aligns perfectly with my passion
for improving developer experience. I am particularly excited about the opportunity to contribute to
your next-generation IDE features.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how my background and skills
can contribute to TechVision's continued success.

Sincerely,
Alex Rivera
`.trim();

// ─── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

async function getTextarea(page: Page) {
  return page.locator('textarea');
}

async function getFormatButton(page: Page) {
  return page.getByRole('button', { name: /format my resume/i });
}

/**
 * Wait for AI formatting to complete OR for an error state to appear.
 * Returns 'success' | 'api_error' | 'timeout'.
 * Uses a short-circuit: if error text appears within 15s we don't wait 90s.
 */
async function waitForFormattingOutcome(page: Page): Promise<'success' | 'api_error' | 'timeout'> {
  const deadline = Date.now() + 90_000;
  const errorPhrases = [
    'api key is not configured',
    'api key not configured',
    'not configured',
    'try again',
    'error',
    'failed',
  ];

  while (Date.now() < deadline) {
    // Check for success
    const alexVisible = await page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false }).isVisible().catch(() => false);
    if (alexVisible) return 'success';

    // Check for API error fast
    const bodyText = (await page.locator('body').innerText().catch(() => '')).toLowerCase();
    if (errorPhrases.some(phrase => bodyText.includes(phrase))) {
      return 'api_error';
    }

    await page.waitForTimeout(1000);
  }
  return 'timeout';
}

// ─── 1. Basic Load ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

test('1a. Page title is OhMyDoc', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);
  await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/OhMyDoc/i);
});

test('1b. Textarea is visible and accepts input', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);
  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await expect(textarea).toBeVisible();
  await textarea.fill('test input');
  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('test input');
});

test('1c. Format button is disabled when textarea is empty', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);
  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('');
  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);
  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();
});

test('1d. Right panel shows placeholder text initially', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);
  await expect(page.getByText('Your formatted document will appear here.')).toBeVisible();
});

test('1e. No critical console errors on load', async ({ page }) => {
  const errors: string[] = [];
  page.on('console', msg => {
    if (msg.type() === 'error') errors.push(msg.text());
  });
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);
  await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');
  const critical = errors.filter(e =>
    !e.includes('favicon') &&
    !e.includes('net::ERR') &&
    !e.includes('ERR_BLOCKED') &&
    !e.includes('extension')
  );
  expect(critical, `Critical console errors: ${critical.join(', ')}`).toHaveLength(0);
});

// ─── 2. Happy Path — Resume ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

test('2. Happy path — resume formatting', async ({ page }) => {
  test.slow();
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);

  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);

  const formatBtn = await getFormatButton(page);
  await expect(formatBtn).toBeEnabled();
  await formatBtn.click();

  // Button should show loading state
  await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /formatting/i })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });

  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);

  // If API key is missing, fail with a clear message
  if (outcome === 'api_error') {
    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();
    const hasApiKeyError = /api key is not configured|api key not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText);
    if (hasApiKeyError) {
      throw new Error(
        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: "OpenAI API key is not configured." ' +
        'The Vercel deployment is missing the required AI API key environment variable. ' +
        'AI formatting cannot function.'
      );
    }
    throw new Error(`AI formatting returned an error. Page text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 300)}`);
  }

  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out after 90s').toBe('success');

  // Name should be visible
  await expect(page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false })).toBeVisible();

  // No raw XML tags in visible content
  const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();
  expect(bodyText, 'Raw XML tags found in rendered preview').not.toMatch(/<\/?[a-z][^>]*>/);

  // Button should return to normal
  await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /format my resume/i })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5_000 });
});

// ─── 3. Happy Path — Cover Letter ───────────────────────────────────────────

test('3. Happy path — cover letter formatting', async ({ page }) => {
  test.slow();
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);

  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await textarea.fill(COVER_LETTER_TEXT);

  const formatBtn = await getFormatButton(page);
  await expect(formatBtn).toBeEnabled();
  await formatBtn.click();

  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);

  if (outcome === 'api_error') {
    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();
    const hasApiKeyError = /api key is not configured|api key not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText);
    if (hasApiKeyError) {
      throw new Error(
        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: "OpenAI API key is not configured." ' +
        'Cover letter formatting cannot function.'
      );
    }
    throw new Error(`AI formatting returned an error. Page text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 300)}`);
  }

  expect(outcome, 'Cover letter formatting timed out after 90s').toBe('success');

  await expect(page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false })).toBeVisible();
  await expect(page.getByText('TechVision', { exact: false })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });

  const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();
  expect(bodyText, 'Raw XML tags found in rendered preview').not.toMatch(/<\/?[a-z][^>]*>/);
});

// ─── 4. Mutation Warning ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

test('4. Mutation/divergence warning element exists in DOM', async ({ page }) => {
  test.slow();
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);

  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);
  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();

  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);

  if (outcome === 'api_error') {
    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();
    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {
      throw new Error(
        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot test divergence warning — API key not configured.'
      );
    }
  }

  if (outcome !== 'success') {
    throw new Error(`Formatting did not complete successfully (outcome: ${outcome})`);
  }

  // Check for warning/alert elements in DOM (may be hidden)
  const warningSelectors = [
    '[class*="warning"]',
    '[class*="diverge"]',
    '[class*="mutation"]',
    '[role="alert"]',
    '[class*="yellow"]',
    '[class*="caution"]',
    '[class*="banner"]',
  ];

  let warningFound = false;
  for (const selector of warningSelectors) {
    if (await page.locator(selector).count() > 0) {
      warningFound = true;
      break;
    }
  }
  const html = await page.content();
  const hasDivergenceText = /diverge|mutation|content may have been changed|modified/i.test(html);

  console.log(`Divergence/mutation warning present in DOM: ${warningFound || hasDivergenceText}`);
  // Informational — passes regardless (warning only shows if divergence > 5%)
  expect(true).toBe(true);
});

// ─── 5. PDF Export ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

test('5. PDF Export button triggers window.print()', async ({ page }) => {
  test.slow();
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);

  // Export PDF button should be disabled initially
  const exportBtn = page.getByRole('button', { name: /export pdf/i });
  await expect(exportBtn).toBeDisabled();

  // Format a document first
  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);
  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();

  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);

  if (outcome === 'api_error') {
    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();
    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {
      throw new Error(
        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot test PDF Export — API key not configured. ' +
        'Export PDF button remains disabled because formatting never completes.'
      );
    }
  }

  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out before PDF export test').toBe('success');

  // Export PDF button should now be enabled
  await expect(exportBtn).toBeEnabled({ timeout: 10_000 });

  // Intercept window.print()
  let printCalled = false;
  await page.exposeFunction('__testPrintCalled', () => { printCalled = true; });
  await page.evaluate(() => {
    window.print = () => {
      (window as any).__testPrintCalled();
    };
  });

  await exportBtn.click();
  await page.waitForTimeout(1000);
  expect(printCalled, 'window.print() was not called when Export PDF was clicked').toBe(true);
});

// ─── 6. Error / Validation States ────────────────────────────────────────────

test('6a. Empty textarea keeps Format button disabled', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);
  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);
  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();
  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('');
  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();
});

test('6b. Short input (<50 chars) shows validation error or keeps button disabled', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);
  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await textarea.fill('hello world test');

  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);
  if (await btn.isEnabled()) {
    await btn.click();
    // Should show a validation/error message
    await page.waitForTimeout(2000);
    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();
    const hasValidationMsg = /too short|minimum|at least|characters|error|please provide/i.test(bodyText);
    const errorCount = await page.locator('[class*="error"], [role="alert"]').count();
    expect(
      hasValidationMsg || errorCount > 0,
      `Expected validation message for short input, body text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 200)}`
    ).toBeTruthy();
  } else {
    // Button disabled for short text — also valid behaviour
    await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();
  }
});

// ─── 7. Skeleton Loading ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

test('7. Skeleton appears during loading and disappears after', async ({ page }) => {
  test.slow();
  await page.goto(BASE_URL);

  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);
  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);
  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();

  // Check for skeleton/shimmer/pulse shortly after clicking
  const skeletonLocator = page.locator(
    '[class*="skeleton"], [class*="shimmer"], [class*="animate-pulse"], [class*="loading"]'
  );

  const skeletonAppearedOrMissed = await skeletonLocator.first().isVisible({ timeout: 10_000 }).catch(() => false);
  console.log(`Skeleton visible during loading: ${skeletonAppearedOrMissed}`);

  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);

  if (outcome === 'api_error') {
    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();
    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {
      throw new Error(
        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot fully test skeleton lifecycle — API key not configured. ' +
        `Skeleton appeared during loading: ${skeletonAppearedOrMissed}`
      );
    }
  }

  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out before skeleton disappear check').toBe('success');

  // After completion, skeleton should not be visible
  const skeletonVisible = await skeletonLocator.first().isVisible().catch(() => false);
  expect(skeletonVisible, 'Skeleton still visible after formatting completed').toBe(false);
});

  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_01Pb6pYe3U6S5FKd586S7vtx",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "import { test, expect, Page } from '@playwright/test';\n\nconst BASE_URL = process.env.BASE_URL || 'https://ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent-eta.vercel.app';\n\nconst RESUME_TEXT = `\nAlex Rivera\nalex.rivera@email.com \u00b7 (555) 123-4567 \u00b7 San Francisco, CA \u00b7 linkedin.com/in/alexrivera\n\nSUMMARY\nFull-stack software engineer with 7 years of experience building scalable web applications.\nPassionate about clean code, user experience, and developer tooling.\n\nEXPERIENCE\n\nSenior Software Engineer \u2014 Acme Corp (2021\u2013Present)\n\u2022 Led development of a microservices architecture serving 2M+ daily active users\n\u2022 Reduced API latency by 40% through caching and database query optimization\n\u2022 Mentored a team of 4 junior engineers and conducted weekly code reviews\n\nSoftware Engineer \u2014 Bright Labs (2019\u20132021)\n\u2022 Built React-based dashboard used by 500+ enterprise clients\n\u2022 Integrated third-party payment APIs (Stripe, PayPal) handling $10M/month in transactions\n\u2022 Wrote comprehensive unit and integration tests achieving 90% code coverage\n\nEDUCATION\nB.S. Computer Science \u2014 University of California, Berkeley (2019)\nDean's List, GPA 3.8/4.0\n\nSKILLS\nLanguages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go\nFrameworks: React, Node.js, Express, Django\nTools: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Git\n`.trim();\n\nconst COVER_LETTER_TEXT = `\nAlex Rivera\nalex.rivera@email.com \u00b7 San Francisco, CA\n\nMarch 4, 2026\n\nHiring Manager\nTechVision Inc.\n123 Innovation Drive\nSan Francisco, CA 94102\n\nDear Hiring Manager,\n\nI am writing to express my strong interest in the Senior Software Engineer position at TechVision Inc.\nWith seven years of experience building high-performance web applications and a proven track record\nof delivering impactful engineering solutions, I am confident I would make a valuable addition to your team.\n\nIn my current role at Acme Corp, I architected a distributed microservices system that scaled to serve\nover two million daily active users while maintaining 99.9% uptime. I thrive in collaborative environments\nand enjoy mentoring junior developers to help them grow their technical skills and professional confidence.\n\nTechVision's commitment to innovation in AI-assisted developer tooling aligns perfectly with my passion\nfor improving developer experience. I am particularly excited about the opportunity to contribute to\nyour next-generation IDE features.\n\nThank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how my background and skills\ncan contribute to TechVision's continued success.\n\nSincerely,\nAlex Rivera\n`.trim();\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Helpers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nasync function getTextarea(page: Page) {\n  return page.locator('textarea');\n}\n\nasync function getFormatButton(page: Page) {\n  return page.getByRole('button', { name: /format my resume/i });\n}\n\n/**\n * Wait for AI formatting to complete OR for an error state to appear.\n * Returns 'success' | 'api_error' | 'timeout'.\n * Uses a short-circuit: if error text appears within 15s we don't wait 90s.\n */\nasync function waitForFormattingOutcome(page: Page): Promise<'success' | 'api_error' | 'timeout'> {\n  const deadline = Date.now() + 90_000;\n  const errorPhrases = [\n    'api key is not configured',\n    'api key not configured',\n    'not configured',\n    'try again',\n    'error',\n    'failed',\n  ];\n\n  while (Date.now() < deadline) {\n    // Check for success\n    const alexVisible = await page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false }).isVisible().catch(() => false);\n    if (alexVisible) return 'success';\n\n    // Check for API error fast\n    const bodyText = (await page.locator('body').innerText().catch(() => '')).toLowerCase();\n    if (errorPhrases.some(phrase => bodyText.includes(phrase))) {\n      return 'api_error';\n    }\n\n    await page.waitForTimeout(1000);\n  }\n  return 'timeout';\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 1. Basic Load \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('1a. Page title is OhMyDoc', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/OhMyDoc/i);\n});\n\ntest('1b. Textarea is visible and accepts input', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await expect(textarea).toBeVisible();\n  await textarea.fill('test input');\n  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('test input');\n});\n\ntest('1c. Format button is disabled when textarea is empty', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('');\n  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();\n});\n\ntest('1d. Right panel shows placeholder text initially', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  await expect(page.getByText('Your formatted document will appear here.')).toBeVisible();\n});\n\ntest('1e. No critical console errors on load', async ({ page }) => {\n  const errors: string[] = [];\n  page.on('console', msg => {\n    if (msg.type() === 'error') errors.push(msg.text());\n  });\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');\n  const critical = errors.filter(e =>\n    !e.includes('favicon') &&\n    !e.includes('net::ERR') &&\n    !e.includes('ERR_BLOCKED') &&\n    !e.includes('extension')\n  );\n  expect(critical, `Critical console errors: ${critical.join(', ')}`).toHaveLength(0);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 2. Happy Path \u2014 Resume \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('2. Happy path \u2014 resume formatting', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);\n\n  const formatBtn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(formatBtn).toBeEnabled();\n  await formatBtn.click();\n\n  // Button should show loading state\n  await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /formatting/i })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  // If API key is missing, fail with a clear message\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    const hasApiKeyError = /api key is not configured|api key not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText);\n    if (hasApiKeyError) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: \"OpenAI API key is not configured.\" ' +\n        'The Vercel deployment is missing the required AI API key environment variable. ' +\n        'AI formatting cannot function.'\n      );\n    }\n    throw new Error(`AI formatting returned an error. Page text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 300)}`);\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out after 90s').toBe('success');\n\n  // Name should be visible\n  await expect(page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false })).toBeVisible();\n\n  // No raw XML tags in visible content\n  const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n  expect(bodyText, 'Raw XML tags found in rendered preview').not.toMatch(/<\\/?[a-z][^>]*>/);\n\n  // Button should return to normal\n  await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /format my resume/i })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5_000 });\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 3. Happy Path \u2014 Cover Letter \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('3. Happy path \u2014 cover letter formatting', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(COVER_LETTER_TEXT);\n\n  const formatBtn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(formatBtn).toBeEnabled();\n  await formatBtn.click();\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    const hasApiKeyError = /api key is not configured|api key not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText);\n    if (hasApiKeyError) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: \"OpenAI API key is not configured.\" ' +\n        'Cover letter formatting cannot function.'\n      );\n    }\n    throw new Error(`AI formatting returned an error. Page text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 300)}`);\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Cover letter formatting timed out after 90s').toBe('success');\n\n  await expect(page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(page.getByText('TechVision', { exact: false })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });\n\n  const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n  expect(bodyText, 'Raw XML tags found in rendered preview').not.toMatch(/<\\/?[a-z][^>]*>/);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 4. Mutation Warning \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('4. Mutation/divergence warning element exists in DOM', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);\n  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot test divergence warning \u2014 API key not configured.'\n      );\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (outcome !== 'success') {\n    throw new Error(`Formatting did not complete successfully (outcome: ${outcome})`);\n  }\n\n  // Check for warning/alert elements in DOM (may be hidden)\n  const warningSelectors = [\n    '[class*=\"warning\"]',\n    '[class*=\"diverge\"]',\n    '[class*=\"mutation\"]',\n    '[role=\"alert\"]',\n    '[class*=\"yellow\"]',\n    '[class*=\"caution\"]',\n    '[class*=\"banner\"]',\n  ];\n\n  let warningFound = false;\n  for (const selector of warningSelectors) {\n    if (await page.locator(selector).count() > 0) {\n      warningFound = true;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n  const html = await page.content();\n  const hasDivergenceText = /diverge|mutation|content may have been changed|modified/i.test(html);\n\n  console.log(`Divergence/mutation warning present in DOM: ${warningFound || hasDivergenceText}`);\n  // Informational \u2014 passes regardless (warning only shows if divergence > 5%)\n  expect(true).toBe(true);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 5. PDF Export \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('5. PDF Export button triggers window.print()', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  // Export PDF button should be disabled initially\n  const exportBtn = page.getByRole('button', { name: /export pdf/i });\n  await expect(exportBtn).toBeDisabled();\n\n  // Format a document first\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);\n  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot test PDF Export \u2014 API key not configured. ' +\n        'Export PDF button remains disabled because formatting never completes.'\n      );\n    }\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out before PDF export test').toBe('success');\n\n  // Export PDF button should now be enabled\n  await expect(exportBtn).toBeEnabled({ timeout: 10_000 });\n\n  // Intercept window.print()\n  let printCalled = false;\n  await page.exposeFunction('__testPrintCalled', () => { printCalled = true; });\n  await page.evaluate(() => {\n    window.print = () => {\n      (window as any).__testPrintCalled();\n    };\n  });\n\n  await exportBtn.click();\n  await page.waitForTimeout(1000);\n  expect(printCalled, 'window.print() was not called when Export PDF was clicked').toBe(true);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 6. Error / Validation States \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('6a. Empty textarea keeps Format button disabled', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('');\n  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();\n});\n\ntest('6b. Short input (<50 chars) shows validation error or keeps button disabled', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill('hello world test');\n\n  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  if (await btn.isEnabled()) {\n    await btn.click();\n    // Should show a validation/error message\n    await page.waitForTimeout(2000);\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    const hasValidationMsg = /too short|minimum|at least|characters|error|please provide/i.test(bodyText);\n    const errorCount = await page.locator('[class*=\"error\"], [role=\"alert\"]').count();\n    expect(\n      hasValidationMsg || errorCount > 0,\n      `Expected validation message for short input, body text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 200)}`\n    ).toBeTruthy();\n  } else {\n    // Button disabled for short text \u2014 also valid behaviour\n    await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 7. Skeleton Loading \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('7. Skeleton appears during loading and disappears after', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);\n  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();\n\n  // Check for skeleton/shimmer/pulse shortly after clicking\n  const skeletonLocator = page.locator(\n    '[class*=\"skeleton\"], [class*=\"shimmer\"], [class*=\"animate-pulse\"], [class*=\"loading\"]'\n  );\n\n  const skeletonAppearedOrMissed = await skeletonLocator.first().isVisible({ timeout: 10_000 }).catch(() => false);\n  console.log(`Skeleton visible during loading: ${skeletonAppearedOrMissed}`);\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot fully test skeleton lifecycle \u2014 API key not configured. ' +\n        `Skeleton appeared during loading: ${skeletonAppearedOrMissed}`\n      );\n    }\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out before skeleton disappear check').toBe('success');\n\n  // After completion, skeleton should not be visible\n  const skeletonVisible = await skeletonLocator.first().isVisible().catch(() => false);\n  expect(skeletonVisible, 'Skeleton still visible after formatting completed').toBe(false);\n});",
    "is_error": false
  }
}

USERMESSAGE #35
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
# OhMyDoc v2 — QA Report

**Date:** 2026-03-04
**Target:** https://ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent-eta.vercel.app
**Browser:** Chromium (Playwright 1.58.2)
**Total Tests:** 12 | **Passed:** 7 | **Failed:** 5

---

## Executive Summary

The OhMyDoc v2 deployment has a **critical blocker**: the AI API key is not configured in the Vercel environment. The error message `"OpenAI API key is not configured."` is displayed whenever the user tries to format a document. This makes the app's core feature — AI-powered document formatting — completely non-functional in production.

All 5 test failures trace directly to this single root cause. The remaining 7 tests (static UI, input validation) pass cleanly.

---

## Critical Bug — P0 Blocker

### BUG-001: OpenAI API Key Not Configured in Vercel Deployment

| Field       | Detail |
|-------------|--------|
| **Severity**    | P0 — Blocker (core feature completely broken) |
| **Component**   | Vercel deployment / environment variables |
| **Error text**  | `"OpenAI API key is not configured."` |
| **Affected tests** | 2, 3, 4, 5, 7 (all AI-dependent flows) |
| **Reproduction** | Paste any text → click "Format My Resume" → see error immediately |
| **Fix**         | Add `OPENAI_API_KEY` (or equivalent) to Vercel project environment variables |

**Observed behaviour after clicking "Format My Resume":**
1. Button briefly shows "Formatting..." ✓ (UI works)
2. Skeleton shimmer appears in preview panel ✓ (UI works)
3. API call fails → preview panel shows `"OpenAI API key is not configured."` with a "Try Again" button ✗
4. "Export PDF" button remains disabled ✗

---

## Test Results

### Group 1: Basic Load

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 1a | Page title is "OhMyDoc" | ✅ PASS | Title matches |
| 1b | Textarea visible & accepts input | ✅ PASS | Works correctly |
| 1c | Format button disabled on empty textarea | ✅ PASS | Disabled until content entered |
| 1d | Right panel shows placeholder text | ✅ PASS | "Your formatted document will appear here." |
| 1e | No critical console errors on load | ✅ PASS | No errors logged at page load |

### Group 2: Happy Path — Resume

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 2 | Resume formatting end-to-end | ❌ FAIL | **BUG-001** — API key not configured |

**Error:** `[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: "OpenAI API key is not configured." The Vercel deployment is missing the required AI API key environment variable.`

**Partially observed (UI behaves correctly up to the API call):**
- ✅ Button transitions to "Formatting..." after click
- ✅ Skeleton shimmer appears in preview panel
- ❌ Preview renders error instead of formatted resume

### Group 3: Happy Path — Cover Letter

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 3 | Cover letter formatting end-to-end | ❌ FAIL | **BUG-001** — API key not configured |

Same failure mode as test 2.

### Group 4: Mutation Warning

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 4 | Divergence warning element in DOM | ❌ FAIL | **BUG-001** — Cannot test; formatting never completes |

Note: DOM and class-name inspection found no `[class*="warning"]`, `[class*="diverge"]`, `[role="alert"]` elements after the error state. The warning feature is untestable in current deployment.

### Group 5: PDF Export

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 5 | Export PDF triggers window.print() | ❌ FAIL | **BUG-001** — Export PDF button stays disabled because formatting never completes |

**Sub-checks:**
- ✅ Export PDF button is **disabled** on initial load (correct)
- ❌ Export PDF button never becomes **enabled** (expected after successful formatting)
- ❌ window.print() never fires

### Group 6: Error States / Validation

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 6a | Empty textarea → button disabled | ✅ PASS | Button correctly stays disabled |
| 6b | Short input (<50 chars) → validation | ✅ PASS | Button disabled for short input (16 chars); client-side guard works |

**Note on 6b:** The button remained disabled for "hello world test" (16 chars). The app uses client-side length gating — the "Format My Resume" button stays disabled until sufficient content is entered. This is valid defensive UX.

### Group 7: Skeleton Loading

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 7 | Skeleton appears during load, disappears after | ❌ FAIL | **BUG-001** — Skeleton appears correctly, but never resolves to content |

**Partial observation:**
- ✅ Skeleton shimmer **was visible** during the loading phase (confirmed: `Skeleton visible during loading: true`)
- ❌ Skeleton resolves to an error state, not formatted content — full lifecycle untestable

---

## Summary of Findings

### Passing (7/12)

All static UI and input-validation features work correctly:
- Page loads without errors
- Layout, placeholder text, and titles render properly
- Format button is correctly gated (disabled for empty/short input)
- Skeleton loading animation fires correctly on submit

### Failing (5/12) — Single Root Cause

All 5 failures share one root cause: **BUG-001** — the `OPENAI_API_KEY` environment variable is not set in the Vercel deployment. Once this is fixed, the full test suite should pass (assuming the AI integration itself works as expected).

### Observations from Partial UI Flow

Even with the broken API key, the following UI behaviour was confirmed working:
| Behaviour | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Format button transitions to "Formatting..." | ✅ |
| Skeleton shimmer appears in preview panel | ✅ |
| Error message is user-facing (not a raw stack trace) | ✅ |
| "Try Again" button appears on error | ✅ |
| Export PDF disabled on initial load | ✅ |

---

## Recommended Fix

1. **In the Vercel project dashboard:** Settings → Environment Variables → add `OPENAI_API_KEY` with the correct key value (Production + Preview + Development).
2. **Redeploy** the project (or trigger a redeployment after adding the variable).
3. **Re-run** this test suite against the fixed deployment — expect 12/12 to pass.

---

## Environment

- **Test runner:** Playwright 1.58.2
- **Browser:** Chromium (headless)
- **Node.js:** via npx
- **Run time:** ~18.5 seconds total (fast-fail on API error detection)
- **Config:** `playwright.config.ts` — `baseURL` from `BASE_URL` env var, timeout 120s, expect 90s
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_01NUdowXEjbrCvXjqb3XfJvg",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "# OhMyDoc v2 \u2014 QA Report\n\n**Date:** 2026-03-04\n**Target:** https://ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent-eta.vercel.app\n**Browser:** Chromium (Playwright 1.58.2)\n**Total Tests:** 12 | **Passed:** 7 | **Failed:** 5\n\n---\n\n## Executive Summary\n\nThe OhMyDoc v2 deployment has a **critical blocker**: the AI API key is not configured in the Vercel environment. The error message `\"OpenAI API key is not configured.\"` is displayed whenever the user tries to format a document. This makes the app's core feature \u2014 AI-powered document formatting \u2014 completely non-functional in production.\n\nAll 5 test failures trace directly to this single root cause. The remaining 7 tests (static UI, input validation) pass cleanly.\n\n---\n\n## Critical Bug \u2014 P0 Blocker\n\n### BUG-001: OpenAI API Key Not Configured in Vercel Deployment\n\n| Field       | Detail |\n|-------------|--------|\n| **Severity**    | P0 \u2014 Blocker (core feature completely broken) |\n| **Component**   | Vercel deployment / environment variables |\n| **Error text**  | `\"OpenAI API key is not configured.\"` |\n| **Affected tests** | 2, 3, 4, 5, 7 (all AI-dependent flows) |\n| **Reproduction** | Paste any text \u2192 click \"Format My Resume\" \u2192 see error immediately |\n| **Fix**         | Add `OPENAI_API_KEY` (or equivalent) to Vercel project environment variables |\n\n**Observed behaviour after clicking \"Format My Resume\":**\n1. Button briefly shows \"Formatting...\" \u2713 (UI works)\n2. Skeleton shimmer appears in preview panel \u2713 (UI works)\n3. API call fails \u2192 preview panel shows `\"OpenAI API key is not configured.\"` with a \"Try Again\" button \u2717\n4. \"Export PDF\" button remains disabled \u2717\n\n---\n\n## Test Results\n\n### Group 1: Basic Load\n\n| # | Test | Result | Notes |\n|---|------|--------|-------|\n| 1a | Page title is \"OhMyDoc\" | \u2705 PASS | Title matches |\n| 1b | Textarea visible & accepts input | \u2705 PASS | Works correctly |\n| 1c | Format button disabled on empty textarea | \u2705 PASS | Disabled until content entered |\n| 1d | Right panel shows placeholder text | \u2705 PASS | \"Your formatted document will appear here.\" |\n| 1e | No critical console errors on load | \u2705 PASS | No errors logged at page load |\n\n### Group 2: Happy Path \u2014 Resume\n\n| # | Test | Result | Notes |\n|---|------|--------|-------|\n| 2 | Resume formatting end-to-end | \u274c FAIL | **BUG-001** \u2014 API key not configured |\n\n**Error:** `[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: \"OpenAI API key is not configured.\" The Vercel deployment is missing the required AI API key environment variable.`\n\n**Partially observed (UI behaves correctly up to the API call):**\n- \u2705 Button transitions to \"Formatting...\" after click\n- \u2705 Skeleton shimmer appears in preview panel\n- \u274c Preview renders error instead of formatted resume\n\n### Group 3: Happy Path \u2014 Cover Letter\n\n| # | Test | Result | Notes |\n|---|------|--------|-------|\n| 3 | Cover letter formatting end-to-end | \u274c FAIL | **BUG-001** \u2014 API key not configured |\n\nSame failure mode as test 2.\n\n### Group 4: Mutation Warning\n\n| # | Test | Result | Notes |\n|---|------|--------|-------|\n| 4 | Divergence warning element in DOM | \u274c FAIL | **BUG-001** \u2014 Cannot test; formatting never completes |\n\nNote: DOM and class-name inspection found no `[class*=\"warning\"]`, `[class*=\"diverge\"]`, `[role=\"alert\"]` elements after the error state. The warning feature is untestable in current deployment.\n\n### Group 5: PDF Export\n\n| # | Test | Result | Notes |\n|---|------|--------|-------|\n| 5 | Export PDF triggers window.print() | \u274c FAIL | **BUG-001** \u2014 Export PDF button stays disabled because formatting never completes |\n\n**Sub-checks:**\n- \u2705 Export PDF button is **disabled** on initial load (correct)\n- \u274c Export PDF button never becomes **enabled** (expected after successful formatting)\n- \u274c window.print() never fires\n\n### Group 6: Error States / Validation\n\n| # | Test | Result | Notes |\n|---|------|--------|-------|\n| 6a | Empty textarea \u2192 button disabled | \u2705 PASS | Button correctly stays disabled |\n| 6b | Short input (<50 chars) \u2192 validation | \u2705 PASS | Button disabled for short input (16 chars); client-side guard works |\n\n**Note on 6b:** The button remained disabled for \"hello world test\" (16 chars). The app uses client-side length gating \u2014 the \"Format My Resume\" button stays disabled until sufficient content is entered. This is valid defensive UX.\n\n### Group 7: Skeleton Loading\n\n| # | Test | Result | Notes |\n|---|------|--------|-------|\n| 7 | Skeleton appears during load, disappears after | \u274c FAIL | **BUG-001** \u2014 Skeleton appears correctly, but never resolves to content |\n\n**Partial observation:**\n- \u2705 Skeleton shimmer **was visible** during the loading phase (confirmed: `Skeleton visible during loading: true`)\n- \u274c Skeleton resolves to an error state, not formatted content \u2014 full lifecycle untestable\n\n---\n\n## Summary of Findings\n\n### Passing (7/12)\n\nAll static UI and input-validation features work correctly:\n- Page loads without errors\n- Layout, placeholder text, and titles render properly\n- Format button is correctly gated (disabled for empty/short input)\n- Skeleton loading animation fires correctly on submit\n\n### Failing (5/12) \u2014 Single Root Cause\n\nAll 5 failures share one root cause: **BUG-001** \u2014 the `OPENAI_API_KEY` environment variable is not set in the Vercel deployment. Once this is fixed, the full test suite should pass (assuming the AI integration itself works as expected).\n\n### Observations from Partial UI Flow\n\nEven with the broken API key, the following UI behaviour was confirmed working:\n| Behaviour | Status |\n|-----------|--------|\n| Format button transitions to \"Formatting...\" | \u2705 |\n| Skeleton shimmer appears in preview panel | \u2705 |\n| Error message is user-facing (not a raw stack trace) | \u2705 |\n| \"Try Again\" button appears on error | \u2705 |\n| Export PDF disabled on initial load | \u2705 |\n\n---\n\n## Recommended Fix\n\n1. **In the Vercel project dashboard:** Settings \u2192 Environment Variables \u2192 add `OPENAI_API_KEY` with the correct key value (Production + Preview + Development).\n2. **Redeploy** the project (or trigger a redeployment after adding the variable).\n3. **Re-run** this test suite against the fixed deployment \u2014 expect 12/12 to pass.\n\n---\n\n## Environment\n\n- **Test runner:** Playwright 1.58.2\n- **Browser:** Chromium (headless)\n- **Node.js:** via npx\n- **Run time:** ~18.5 seconds total (fast-fail on API error detection)\n- **Config:** `playwright.config.ts` \u2014 `baseURL` from `BASE_URL` env var, timeout 120s, expect 90s",
    "is_error": false
  }
}

The previous tests ran against `https://ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent-eta.vercel.app` but the current live URL is `https://ohmydoc.vercel.app` I need to: 1. Get the existing test code from the branch `origin/qa/ohmydoc-v2-playwright-v2` 2. Update it to run against the current production URL 3. Check the playwright configuration from that branch 4. Write documentation, commit everything, and post the results on Linear Let me pull the playwright config from that branch and get the environment ready.

Write TOOL CALL 
{
  "file_path": "/home/gem/project/tests/ohmydoc.spec.ts",
  "content": "import { test, expect, Page } from '@playwright/test';\n\nconst BASE_URL = process.env.BASE_URL || 'https://ohmydoc.vercel.app';\n\nconst RESUME_TEXT = `\nAlex Rivera\nalex.rivera@email.com \u00b7 (555) 123-4567 \u00b7 San Francisco, CA \u00b7 linkedin.com/in/alexrivera\n\nSUMMARY\nFull-stack software engineer with 7 years of experience building scalable web applications.\nPassionate about clean code, user experience, and developer tooling.\n\nEXPERIENCE\n\nSenior Software Engineer \u2014 Acme Corp (2021\u2013Present)\n\u2022 Led development of a microservices architecture serving 2M+ daily active users\n\u2022 Reduced API latency by 40% through caching and database query optimization\n\u2022 Mentored a team of 4 junior engineers and conducted weekly code reviews\n\nSoftware Engineer \u2014 Bright Labs (2019\u20132021)\n\u2022 Built React-based dashboard used by 500+ enterprise clients\n\u2022 Integrated third-party payment APIs (Stripe, PayPal) handling $10M/month in transactions\n\u2022 Wrote comprehensive unit and integration tests achieving 90% code coverage\n\nEDUCATION\nB.S. Computer Science \u2014 University of California, Berkeley (2019)\nDean's List, GPA 3.8/4.0\n\nSKILLS\nLanguages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go\nFrameworks: React, Node.js, Express, Django\nTools: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Git\n`.trim();\n\nconst COVER_LETTER_TEXT = `\nAlex Rivera\nalex.rivera@email.com \u00b7 San Francisco, CA\n\nMarch 4, 2026\n\nHiring Manager\nTechVision Inc.\n123 Innovation Drive\nSan Francisco, CA 94102\n\nDear Hiring Manager,\n\nI am writing to express my strong interest in the Senior Software Engineer position at TechVision Inc.\nWith seven years of experience building high-performance web applications and a proven track record\nof delivering impactful engineering solutions, I am confident I would make a valuable addition to your team.\n\nIn my current role at Acme Corp, I architected a distributed microservices system that scaled to serve\nover two million daily active users while maintaining 99.9% uptime. I thrive in collaborative environments\nand enjoy mentoring junior developers to help them grow their technical skills and professional confidence.\n\nTechVision's commitment to innovation in AI-assisted developer tooling aligns perfectly with my passion\nfor improving developer experience. I am particularly excited about the opportunity to contribute to\nyour next-generation IDE features.\n\nThank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how my background and skills\ncan contribute to TechVision's continued success.\n\nSincerely,\nAlex Rivera\n`.trim();\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 Helpers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\nasync function getTextarea(page: Page) {\n  return page.locator('textarea');\n}\n\nasync function getFormatButton(page: Page) {\n  return page.getByRole('button', { name: /format my resume/i });\n}\n\n/**\n * Wait for AI formatting to complete OR for an error state to appear.\n * Returns 'success' | 'api_error' | 'timeout'.\n * Uses a short-circuit: if error text appears within 15s we don't wait 90s.\n */\nasync function waitForFormattingOutcome(page: Page): Promise<'success' | 'api_error' | 'timeout'> {\n  const deadline = Date.now() + 90_000;\n  const errorPhrases = [\n    'api key is not configured',\n    'api key not configured',\n    'not configured',\n    'try again',\n    'error',\n    'failed',\n  ];\n\n  while (Date.now() < deadline) {\n    // Check for success\n    const alexVisible = await page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false }).isVisible().catch(() => false);\n    if (alexVisible) return 'success';\n\n    // Check for API error fast\n    const bodyText = (await page.locator('body').innerText().catch(() => '')).toLowerCase();\n    if (errorPhrases.some(phrase => bodyText.includes(phrase))) {\n      return 'api_error';\n    }\n\n    await page.waitForTimeout(1000);\n  }\n  return 'timeout';\n}\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 1. Basic Load \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('1a. Page title is OhMyDoc', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/OhMyDoc/i);\n});\n\ntest('1b. Textarea is visible and accepts input', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await expect(textarea).toBeVisible();\n  await textarea.fill('test input');\n  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('test input');\n});\n\ntest('1c. Format button is disabled when textarea is empty', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('');\n  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();\n});\n\ntest('1d. Right panel shows placeholder text initially', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  await expect(page.getByText('Your formatted document will appear here.')).toBeVisible();\n});\n\ntest('1e. No critical console errors on load', async ({ page }) => {\n  const errors: string[] = [];\n  page.on('console', msg => {\n    if (msg.type() === 'error') errors.push(msg.text());\n  });\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');\n  const critical = errors.filter(e =>\n    !e.includes('favicon') &&\n    !e.includes('net::ERR') &&\n    !e.includes('ERR_BLOCKED') &&\n    !e.includes('extension')\n  );\n  expect(critical, `Critical console errors: ${critical.join(', ')}`).toHaveLength(0);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 2. Happy Path \u2014 Resume \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('2. Happy path \u2014 resume formatting', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);\n\n  const formatBtn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(formatBtn).toBeEnabled();\n  await formatBtn.click();\n\n  // Button should show loading state\n  await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /formatting/i })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  // If API key is missing, fail with a clear message\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    const hasApiKeyError = /api key is not configured|api key not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText);\n    if (hasApiKeyError) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: \"OpenAI API key is not configured.\" ' +\n        'The Vercel deployment is missing the required AI API key environment variable. ' +\n        'AI formatting cannot function.'\n      );\n    }\n    throw new Error(`AI formatting returned an error. Page text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 300)}`);\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out after 90s').toBe('success');\n\n  // Name should be visible\n  await expect(page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false })).toBeVisible();\n\n  // No raw XML tags in visible content\n  const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n  expect(bodyText, 'Raw XML tags found in rendered preview').not.toMatch(/<\\/?[a-z][^>]*>/);\n\n  // Button should return to normal\n  await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /format my resume/i })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5_000 });\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 3. Happy Path \u2014 Cover Letter \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('3. Happy path \u2014 cover letter formatting', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(COVER_LETTER_TEXT);\n\n  const formatBtn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(formatBtn).toBeEnabled();\n  await formatBtn.click();\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    const hasApiKeyError = /api key is not configured|api key not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText);\n    if (hasApiKeyError) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: \"OpenAI API key is not configured.\" ' +\n        'Cover letter formatting cannot function.'\n      );\n    }\n    throw new Error(`AI formatting returned an error. Page text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 300)}`);\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Cover letter formatting timed out after 90s').toBe('success');\n\n  await expect(page.getByText('Alex Rivera', { exact: false })).toBeVisible();\n  await expect(page.getByText('TechVision', { exact: false })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });\n\n  const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n  expect(bodyText, 'Raw XML tags found in rendered preview').not.toMatch(/<\\/?[a-z][^>]*>/);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 4. Mutation Warning \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('4. Mutation/divergence warning element exists in DOM', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);\n  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot test divergence warning \u2014 API key not configured.'\n      );\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (outcome !== 'success') {\n    throw new Error(`Formatting did not complete successfully (outcome: ${outcome})`);\n  }\n\n  // Check for warning/alert elements in DOM (may be hidden)\n  const warningSelectors = [\n    '[class*=\"warning\"]',\n    '[class*=\"diverge\"]',\n    '[class*=\"mutation\"]',\n    '[role=\"alert\"]',\n    '[class*=\"yellow\"]',\n    '[class*=\"caution\"]',\n    '[class*=\"banner\"]',\n  ];\n\n  let warningFound = false;\n  for (const selector of warningSelectors) {\n    if (await page.locator(selector).count() > 0) {\n      warningFound = true;\n      break;\n    }\n  }\n  const html = await page.content();\n  const hasDivergenceText = /diverge|mutation|content may have been changed|modified/i.test(html);\n\n  console.log(`Divergence/mutation warning present in DOM: ${warningFound || hasDivergenceText}`);\n  // Informational \u2014 passes regardless (warning only shows if divergence > 5%)\n  expect(true).toBe(true);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 5. PDF Export \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('5. PDF Export button triggers window.print()', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  // Export PDF button should be disabled initially\n  const exportBtn = page.getByRole('button', { name: /export pdf/i });\n  await expect(exportBtn).toBeDisabled();\n\n  // Format a document first\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);\n  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot test PDF Export \u2014 API key not configured. ' +\n        'Export PDF button remains disabled because formatting never completes.'\n      );\n    }\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out before PDF export test').toBe('success');\n\n  // Export PDF button should now be enabled\n  await expect(exportBtn).toBeEnabled({ timeout: 10_000 });\n\n  // Intercept window.print()\n  let printCalled = false;\n  await page.exposeFunction('__testPrintCalled', () => { printCalled = true; });\n  await page.evaluate(() => {\n    window.print = () => {\n      (window as any).__testPrintCalled();\n    };\n  });\n\n  await exportBtn.click();\n  await page.waitForTimeout(1000);\n  expect(printCalled, 'window.print() was not called when Export PDF was clicked').toBe(true);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 6. Error / Validation States \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('6a. Empty textarea keeps Format button disabled', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await expect(textarea).toHaveValue('');\n  await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();\n});\n\ntest('6b. Short input (<50 chars) shows validation error or keeps button disabled', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill('hello world test');\n\n  const btn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  if (await btn.isEnabled()) {\n    await btn.click();\n    // Should show a validation/error message\n    await page.waitForTimeout(2000);\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    const hasValidationMsg = /too short|minimum|at least|characters|error|please provide/i.test(bodyText);\n    const errorCount = await page.locator('[class*=\"error\"], [role=\"alert\"]').count();\n    expect(\n      hasValidationMsg || errorCount > 0,\n      `Expected validation message for short input, body text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 200)}`\n    ).toBeTruthy();\n  } else {\n    // Button disabled for short text \u2014 also valid behaviour\n    await expect(btn).toBeDisabled();\n  }\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 7. Skeleton Loading \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('7. Skeleton appears during loading and disappears after', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  await textarea.fill(RESUME_TEXT);\n  await (await getFormatButton(page)).click();\n\n  // Check for skeleton/shimmer/pulse shortly after clicking\n  const skeletonLocator = page.locator(\n    '[class*=\"skeleton\"], [class*=\"shimmer\"], [class*=\"animate-pulse\"], [class*=\"loading\"]'\n  );\n\n  const skeletonAppearedOrMissed = await skeletonLocator.first().isVisible({ timeout: 10_000 }).catch(() => false);\n  console.log(`Skeleton visible during loading: ${skeletonAppearedOrMissed}`);\n\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Cannot fully test skeleton lifecycle \u2014 API key not configured. ' +\n        `Skeleton appeared during loading: ${skeletonAppearedOrMissed}`\n      );\n    }\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Formatting timed out before skeleton disappear check').toBe('success');\n\n  // After completion, skeleton should not be visible\n  const skeletonVisible = await skeletonLocator.first().isVisible().catch(() => false);\n  expect(skeletonVisible, 'Skeleton still visible after formatting completed').toBe(false);\n});\n\n// \u2500\u2500\u2500 8. Sample Content \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\ntest('8a. Sample content button is visible', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n  // Look for a \"sample\" / \"try sample\" / \"load sample\" / \"use sample\" button or link\n  const sampleLocator = page.getByRole('button', { name: /sample/i })\n    .or(page.getByRole('link', { name: /sample/i }))\n    .or(page.getByText(/try sample|load sample|use sample|sample resume/i));\n  await expect(sampleLocator.first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });\n});\n\ntest('8b. Sample content populates textarea and enables Format button', async ({ page }) => {\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  const sampleLocator = page.getByRole('button', { name: /sample/i })\n    .or(page.getByRole('link', { name: /sample/i }))\n    .or(page.getByText(/try sample|load sample|use sample|sample resume/i));\n\n  await expect(sampleLocator.first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });\n  await sampleLocator.first().click();\n\n  // Textarea should now have content\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  const value = await textarea.inputValue();\n  expect(value.length, 'Sample content did not populate the textarea').toBeGreaterThan(50);\n\n  // Format button should be enabled after loading sample\n  const formatBtn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(formatBtn).toBeEnabled({ timeout: 5_000 });\n});\n\ntest('8c. Sample content can be formatted end-to-end', async ({ page }) => {\n  test.slow();\n  await page.goto(BASE_URL);\n\n  // Load sample content\n  const sampleLocator = page.getByRole('button', { name: /sample/i })\n    .or(page.getByRole('link', { name: /sample/i }))\n    .or(page.getByText(/try sample|load sample|use sample|sample resume/i));\n\n  await expect(sampleLocator.first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10_000 });\n  await sampleLocator.first().click();\n\n  // Verify textarea has content\n  const textarea = await getTextarea(page);\n  const value = await textarea.inputValue();\n  expect(value.length).toBeGreaterThan(50);\n\n  // Click format\n  const formatBtn = await getFormatButton(page);\n  await expect(formatBtn).toBeEnabled();\n  await formatBtn.click();\n\n  // Wait for outcome\n  const outcome = await waitForFormattingOutcome(page);\n\n  if (outcome === 'api_error') {\n    const bodyText = await page.locator('body').innerText();\n    if (/api key is not configured|not configured/i.test(bodyText)) {\n      throw new Error(\n        '[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: Sample content formatting failed \u2014 API key not configured.'\n      );\n    }\n    throw new Error(`Sample content formatting returned an error. Page text: ${bodyText.substring(0, 300)}`);\n  }\n\n  expect(outcome, 'Sample content formatting timed out after 90s').toBe('success');\n\n  // Preview should show formatted content (not placeholder)\n  await expect(page.getByText('Your formatted document will appear here.')).not.toBeVisible({ timeout: 5_000 });\n});\n"
}

  "content": {
    "type": "tool_use",
